title: Infant Carer/ Healthcare Assistant (Part Time)
description:
Join Our Team of Healthcare Heroines!

Are you ready to make a difference in people's lives? Do you have a passion for caring and a desire to be a part of a dedicated team of healthcare professionals? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you! We are recruiting on behalf of My Queen.

About My Queen

At My Queen, we believe that every woman deserves the royal treatment after childbirth. Our quintessential women, representing the epitome of modernity, inspire us to create a haven of maternal wellness unlike any other. With cutting-edge facilities and a team of healthcare assistants, we aim to set new standards in prenatal and postpartum care, catering to the unique needs of every queen who graces us with her presence. We believe in a Happy Mum, a Happy Baby.

To learn more about what we do, please watch this video or visit our website.

We have also appeared on Channel New Asia, Channel 8 News, Lianhe Zaobao and Yahoo

Key Responsibilities

Baby Care Duties include:

  • Cleaning, bathing and changing of diapers
  • Feeding of babies, ensuring Baby Safety, Umbilical, Oral and Eye Care
  • Taking note of babies’ temperature, feeding pattern, mental/physical behaviour, and/or other necessary information
  • Monitoring of babies’ growing progress
  • Guide parents in infection control and baby safety measurements
  • Assist in any other duties as required by the supervisor or manager

Mummy Care Duties Include:

  • Monitoring of Mummies' recovery progress
  • Guiding mummies in breastfeeding and baby care techniques
  • Assist mothers in understanding and coping with postnatal conditions

Working Hours

  • 8:00AM - 8:00PM | 8:00PM - 8:00AM (Inclusive of 1.5hr Break)
  • 2 x Morning/Night Shifts

Salary

  • From $120 (weekday) and $132 (weekend/public holiday)
  • Additional Night Shift Allowance

*Salary stated in the listing is based on a 4.33-week month*

Additional Information

  • Paid On-The-Job Training
  • Lunch and Dinner provided for Day Shift
  • Uniform provided
  • Night Shift Allowance

Job Requirements

  • Singaporean and PRs only
  • Strong mindset to remain calm and patient
  • Physically fit to carry out daily tasks of carrying infants, and standing for long hours
  • Relevant experience would be good
  • Able to commit twice a week
  • Able to work on Weekends, Public Holidays & Night Shifts

hiringCompany.description:
About My Queen

Join My Queen, a rising leader in postpartum care and wellness, where you'll not only build a fulfilling career but also contribute to women empowerment and the support of first-time/young mothers. This is a unique opportunity where every day, you’ll have the joy of working with adorable babies while making a real difference in the lives of new mothers.

At My Queen, we believe in empowering women—both our clients and our team—by creating a nurturing, inclusive environment where women thrive. As part of our team, you’ll have the unique opportunity to support new mothers as they navigate this crucial time in their lives, providing care, compassion, and guidance.

We are passionate about fostering personal and professional growth, especially for those who want to make a real impact. As a fast-growing company, we offer ample opportunities to advance in a meaningful career, while contributing to the success of a brand that champions women’s strength, resilience, and well-being.

Be part of a team that’s reshaping the future of postpartum care but also lets you experience the delight of working with cute, lovable babies every single day. Together, we can uplift new mothers, promote wellness, and grow with an organization that's making waves in the industry.

Apply now and join a company that values empowerment, compassion, and positive change!


Find out more about My Queen from

Corporate video : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=70TcqRw5WaA

Website : www.myqueen.asia

My Queen has garnered recognition and media attention,
